notes: Default Ex-2 producer examples for SDK contract roundtrip tests.

valid_examples.name: producer-minimal-a
valid_examples.notes: Valid Ex-2 producer payload using placeholder subsystem data.

valid_examples.name: producer-minimal-b
valid_examples.notes: Valid Ex-2 producer payload with a second placeholder timestamp.

invalid_examples.name: ingest-seq-leak
invalid_examples.notes: Ingest metadata guard: ingest_seq is owned by ingest and must not appear in producer payloads.

invalid_examples.name: missing-subsystem-id
invalid_examples.notes: Producer-owned required field guard: Ex-2 requires subsystem_id.

invalid_examples.name: unknown-ex-type
invalid_examples.notes: Unknown Ex type guard: Ex-9 is not a supported producer payload type.

invalid_examples.name: wrong-ex-type-for-produced-shape
invalid_examples.notes: Ex type mismatch guard: produced_at payloads must not be declared as Ex-0.
